title: bromus japonicus f. variegatus
intro: Bromus japonicus f. variegatus, also known as Japanese brome or variegated brome, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bromus japonicus f. variegatus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, as well as acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although I couldn't find specific information on herbal preparations.
